headline_highlight: No overhead. No juniors. Only experts.
headline_plain: Senior expertise directly on your site.
subline: At ASIGHT you work directly with the minds who drive your project to success – from the first analysis to the final implementation on the shopfloor.

founders.name: Alexander Eyb
manifesto:
After years in quality and process management at OEMs and Tier-1 suppliers, my path eventually led me into senior leadership. I learned how to steer organizations – but along the way, I came to miss one thing: the work on the project itself.
With ASIGHT, we have returned to where our work makes the most sense: the shop floor. I want to stand at the machine with your team, understand the real problems, and work out solutions together – bringing the strategic experience from the leadership level, but applying it where value is actually created.
So that our results don't end up in a PowerPoint deck but take lasting effect in your processes, we combine consulting and solutions under one roof. With ASIGHT Solutions, we jointly develop the automation that fit each project – from data analysis to a tailor-made programming for your specific use case. That's how a good analysis becomes a lasting impact that stays.

founders.name: Florian Bartsch
manifesto:
Good concepts rarely fail because of the idea. They fail because the data remains messy, because automation projects get stuck at complex interfaces, or because tools are built that no one ends up using in daily operations. I've experienced this again and again over years in project and process management.
This is exactly where I come in with ASIGHT Solutions. I build the systems that carry companies through the transformation – from the PLC at the machine to the dashboard on the plant manager's desk. I gather the data where it is generated, and make it visible where decisions are made.
Together with ASIGHT Consulting, I deliver the right instrument for each project: a tool for the production manager, a decision template for the executive board, an interface between worlds that haven't spoken to each other before. We stay until it works in everyday operations.
